query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS solicitacoes_acoes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  pdiId INT NOT NULL,
  macroId INT NOT NULL,
  microcompetencia VARCHAR(255),
  titulo VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  descricao TEXT,
  prazo DATE NOT NULL,
  solicitanteId INT NOT NULL,
  statusGeral ENUM('aguardando_ckm','aguardando_gestor','aguardando_rh','aprovada','vetada_gestor','vetada_rh') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'aguardando_ckm',
  ckmParecerTipo ENUM('com_aderencia','sem_aderencia'),
  ckmParecerTexto TEXT,
  ckmParecerPor INT,
  ckmParecerEm TIMESTAMP NULL,
  gestorDecisao ENUM('aprovado','reprovado'),
  gestorJustificativa TEXT,
  gestorId INT,
  gestorDecisaoEm TIMESTAMP NULL,
  rhDecisao ENUM('aprovado','reprovado'),
  rhJustificativa TEXT,
  rhId INT,
  rhDecisaoEm TIMESTAMP NULL,
  acaoIncluidaId INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

  ckmParecerTipo ENUM('com_aderencia','sem_aderencia'),
  ckmParecerTexto TEXT,

  gestorDecisao ENUM('aprovado','reprovado'),
  gestorJustificativa TEXT,

  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
